title: Pinion e-MTB selection page
verified_scope: OEM e-MTB examples using Pinion E-Drive / MGU
key_verified_facts: Official Pinion page lists e-MTB examples including Simplon Rapcon :ePinion, Bulls Vuca EVO AM and FSX, Rotwild R.X1000, Nicolai Saturn 14 Swift and Tout Terrain Pamir, with E-Drive or Pinion references.
limits_or_caveats: Official selection page proves category/OEM presence, but not independent sales volume or user satisfaction.

title: Pinion e-trekking selection page
verified_scope: OEM trekking/SUV examples using Pinion E-Drive / MGU
key_verified_facts: Official Pinion page lists e-trekking/urban examples including Flyer Upstreet TR:CF, Kettler Pinniato, Kettler Quadriga, Rotwild R.C1000, Tout Terrain Pamir and VSF Fahrradmanufaktur T-X1000, with E-Drive or Pinion references.
limits_or_caveats: Official selection page proves category/OEM presence, but not sales volume or owner feedback.

title: Simplon KAGU :ePinion High official product page
verified_scope: Simplon KAGU :ePinion High OEM bike example
key_verified_facts: Official Simplon page describes KAGU :ePinion High as a high-end SUV e-bike for urban commuting, off-road adventures and family outings. It highlights Pinion E1.12 MGU, 12-speed integrated transmission, Gates Carbon Drive belt, FIT system, 960 Wh battery and 150 kg maximum system weight.
limits_or_caveats: Official product page; price and market performance not extracted in this pass.

title: Simplon Rapcon :ePinion official product page
key_verified_facts: Official Simplon page states Rapcon :ePinion uses Pinion MGU E1.12, Gates Carbon Drive belt, 12-speed integrated transmission, FIT system, 960 Wh battery, Bosch ABS Pro and Fox suspension. It positions the bike for eMTB uphill and downhill use.
limits_or_caveats: Official product page; no independent ride assessment.

title: ElektroRad/Radfahren test of Simplon Kagu :ePinion High
verified_scope: Professional test of Simplon Kagu :ePinion High with Pinion MGU
key_verified_facts: Review describes Kagu :ePinion High as a flagship SUV/touring e-bike with Pinion MGU, 960 Wh battery and Gates belt. It reports smooth/rund shifting, strong motor support, low maintenance and very high range. It notes gear shifts can be audibly heard in high gears and says automatic mode changed gears during climbs and descents so the tester barely missed derailleur gears.
limits_or_caveats: Media test, not lab measurement. Subjective impressions from one review.

title: WELT bike test: Simplon Kagu ePinion with Pinion MGU
verified_scope: Media ride test of Pinion MGU on Simplon Kagu ePinion
key_verified_facts: Search result and accessible snippet indicate the article tests Pinion MGU on Simplon Kagu ePinion and frames the system as motor and gearbox combined in one housing, with automatic shifting that can make gear changing unnecessary.
limits_or_caveats: Snippet/search-result evidence only; article content not fully extracted. Use cautiously as media lead, not detailed finding.

title: WELT report on Flyer Upstreet TR:CF Pinion
verified_scope: Media/vehicle evidence for Flyer Upstreet TR:CF with Pinion MGU
key_verified_facts: Search result indicates Flyer Upstreet TR:CF 7.63 is presented as a vehicle with the new Pinion e-bike drive, combining motor and gearbox in one housing and described as innovative for sport/touring use.
limits_or_caveats: Snippet/search-result evidence only; article content not fully extracted. Use as lead for OEM example, not full spec.

title: Simplon e-bike motors compared magazine page
verified_scope: Simplon's positioning of Pinion MGU versus Bosch/Avinox systems
key_verified_facts: Official Simplon page compares e-bike motors and states Pinion MGU offers maintenance-free shifting, integrated motor+transmission, 85 Nm torque, up to 12 gears, 600% range, 600/800 W peak power, Start.Select/Pre.Select and Auto.Shift for smooth gear changes.
limits_or_caveats: Brand educational page, not independent testing. Useful for OEM messaging and positioning.
